hero.name: Fernando Pinto
hero.tagline: Building interfaces that retain, engage, and identify.

manifesto.headline: Frontend is not just design.
manifesto.body_1: Every pixel has a purpose. Every animation, a reason. High-quality Frontend isn't just ornamentation.
manifesto.body_2: I build interfaces that think like products: strategic, accessible, with a strong enough identity to be remembered.
manifesto.quote: "Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away"

buskasher.title: Buskasher
buskasher.subtitle: Intelligent Kosher Food Search Engine
buskasher.description: A specialized platform for searching and cataloging food products with Kosher dietary restrictions. Currently focused on the development of V2, prioritizing architectural scalability and administrative user experience (UX) optimization. Due to contractual obligations, technical and visual details of this version remain confidential until the official release.
buskasher.nda_notice: V2 images cannot be disclosed yet due to confidentiality agreement.

languages.english_detail: Technical communication, documentation and international collaboration
languages.tech_note_body: This portfolio supports dynamic language switching via vue-i18n + Pinia
